data.title: LISC Launches 2026 California Affordable Housing Development Training Institute (HDTI)
data.description: A program spanning across the state has been initiated to enhance the capacity of nonprofit developers. Over the course of 35 years, more than 600 practitioners have been trained through this program. Recently, the Local Initiatives Support Corporation (LISC), a significant community development financial institution, has kicked off the 2026 California initiative in Los Angeles on March 19, 2026.

data.title: Ammonium Nitrate Market Growing at 4.36% CAGR to Reach 58.19 Million Tons by 2031 Supported by Fertilizer Demand and Mining Applications, Reports Mordor Intelligence
data.description: In Hyderabad, India, as of March 19, 2026, a recent report by Mordor Intelligence indicates a significant growth forecast for the global ammonium nitrate market. The report projects a rise from 53.43 million tons in 2026 to 58.19 million tons by 2031, representing a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 4.36%. data.title: Dogecoin aiming for $0.10 recovery despite bearish trend. Short-term target $0.095, medium-term $0.09-$0.10. Bullish breakout at $0.10, support at $0.092.
data.description: Summary of DOGE Price Predictions: In the short term, the target within the next week is $0.095. Looking ahead over the medium term, a range of $0.09 to $0.10 is forecasted for the next month. The bullish breakout level is set at $0.10, while the critical support level stands at $0.092. These predictions indicate potential fluctuations in the value of DOGE in the near future.

data.title: EnerCom Announces Initial List of Presenting Companies for the 31st Annual Energy Investment Conference to be held August 17-19, 2026, in Denver, Colorado
data.description: EnerCom Denver is celebrating its 31st year of bringing together companies, investors, analysts, and industry leaders at The Energy Investment Conference. Various presentation opportunities are open for E&P, Midstream, OFS, Minerals, and Energy Transition companies. Additionally, sponsorship opportunities are available for interested parties.

data.title: AGM recap: Important yearly meeting held to discuss financial results, with $1.2 million profit reported.
data.description: Last week, a report was released revealing that the unemployment rate in the country has reached a record low of 3.8%. This rate is the lowest in over a decade and marks a significant decrease from the previous quarter's rate of 4.5%. The report also showed that the economy added 250,000 new jobs in the past month, with the majority of these jobs being in the manufacturing and tech sectors. Additionally, average hourly wages have increased by 2.7% compared to last year. Experts attribute this positive trend to steady economic growth and increased consumer confidence. Despite these promising numbers, concerns remain about the impact of potential trade tariffs and rising inflation rates.

data.title: Eli Lilly Says Experimental Diabetes Drug Shows Weight Loss Of 17%
data.description: Eli Lilly and Co (LLY) experienced a decline in its stock value. The company shared updates on its experimental drug, retatrutide, displaying promising outcomes in clinical tests. Retatrutide, a weekly triple hormone receptor agonist targeting GIP, GLP-1, and glucagon receptors, exhibited notable results. Eli Lilly reported that in the TRANSCEND-T2D-1 trial, retatrutide led to a substantial reduction in A1C levels by around 1.7% to 2.0% over a 40-week period. Participants on the 12 mg dosage also witnessed an average weight loss of 36.6 lbs (16.8%), showing no signs of a slowdown.

data.title: Novo Nordisk A/S: Wegovy® HD (semaglutide 7.2 mg) approved in the US, providing 20.7% mean weight loss
data.description: The FDA in the United States has given its approval for Wegovy® HD, an injectable semaglutide 7.2 mg taken once a week, as a treatment to decrease excess body weight and sustain long-term weight loss.

data.title: Solana expected to reach $94-$102 by April 2026, showing mixed signals with RSI at 48.28 and bearish MACD momentum.
data.description: Solana's current market indicators present a conflicting picture, with its Relative Strength Index (RSI) standing at a neutral 48.28 and a bearish Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD) momentum. Analysis indicates a possible rebound to the $94-$102 range if buyers manage to regain important support levels. The price forecast for SOL remains uncertain, pending further market developments.

data.title: CORRECTING and REPLACING PHOTO Lumifi Announces Agreement with Vizient to Strengthen Cybersecurity for Healthcare Organizations
data.description: In Scottsdale, Arizona, Lumifi has announced a partnership with Vizient aimed at enhancing cybersecurity for healthcare organizations. As a prominent provider of cybersecurity solutions, Lumifi is pleased to reveal its new contract with Vizient, the largest provider-driven healthcare performance improvement company in the nation. This collaboration ensures that Vizient's provider clients will benefit from enhanced cybersecurity measures. The revised photo accompanying this announcement supersedes the one previously released on February 18, 2026.

data.title: Doxel Named One of Forbes’ Best Startup Employers in America 2026
data.description: A California-based company, Doxel, Inc., recognized for its AI-driven automated construction progress monitoring, has recently been listed among Forbes' America’s Best Startup Employers for the year 2026.
